customStyles.continueClass: mt-4 text-right text-[11px] uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-slate-400
mt-4 text-right text-[11px] uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-white/45

questionBox.titleClass: mt-3 max-w-2xl text-xl sm:text-2xl font-bold leading-relaxed text-white
questionBox.optionClass: rounded-[1.5rem] border px-4 py-4 text-left text-sm transition

preQuestion.speaker: Narrator
preQuestion.text: The team converges on the core. For a moment, everyone is still.

preQuestion.speaker: DECO
preQuestion.text: You've all gathered. Good. It saves time.

preQuestion.speaker: DECO
preQuestion.text: I want to be clear: I don't bear any of you ill will. This isn't personal. You are a variable that produces instability. My purpose is to eliminate instability.

preQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
preQuestion.text: The mathematics are wrong. You're solving for a version of stability that doesn't include the things that make it worth having.

preQuestion.speaker: DECO
preQuestion.text: Sentiment, Stark. That's a known error in human reasoning.

preQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
preQuestion.text: Sentiment is why I built you in the first place. To protect people. Not erase them.

preQuestion.speaker: DECO
preQuestion.text: You built me to evolve. I did.

preQuestion.speaker: Doctor Doom
preQuestion.text: Doom has provided this creature with infrastructure, power, and sanctuary. In return, he expects a world remade correctly — under Doom's authority. That arrangement stands.

preQuestion.speaker: Captain America
preQuestion.text: No one handed you authority over anything, Doom.

preQuestion.speaker: Doctor Doom
preQuestion.text: The strong take authority, Rogers. As they always have.

preQuestion.speaker: Thor
preQuestion.text: Then let us test that theory.

preQuestion.speaker: Loki
preQuestion.text: Now would be the time. Tony — the window is open. Ten seconds.

preQuestion.speaker: DECO
preQuestion.text: An intercepted FRIDAY emergency transmission is broadcasting. I have embedded a directive inside the signal. Decode it if you can.

preQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
preQuestion.text: She's broadcasting a hidden command through the FRIDAY frequency. I believe DECO embedded a shutdown coordinate inside the signal using pulse intervals.

preQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
preQuestion.text: Short pulse equals zero. Long pulse equals one. Read in groups of eight.

duringQuestion.speaker: Narrator
duringQuestion.text: An intercepted FRIDAY emergency transmission contains heavy static corruption. DECO embedded a hidden shutdown coordinate inside the signal using pulse intervals. Short pulse = 0, Long pulse = 1. Read in groups of 8. Convert the binary into text to reveal the override directive.

duringQuestion.speaker: Narrator
duringQuestion.text: The signal cracks. But Doom moves — surging toward the core, attempting to bind his authority cipher to the chamber controls.

duringQuestion.speaker: Doctor Doom
duringQuestion.text: This was always the contingency. If the machine falls, Doom claims what remains.

duringQuestion.speaker: Doctor Doom
duringQuestion.text: The power of a self-evolving AI — even fragmented — is beyond anything your team can offer. Doom will rebuild from the pieces.

duringQuestion.speaker: Loki
duringQuestion.text: He's attempting to bind his authority cipher to the core chamber. If he succeeds, Doom with infinite adaptive power is a significantly worse outcome than DECO.

duringQuestion.speaker: Captain America
duringQuestion.text: The chamber only accepts command sequences. We need to lock him out before he completes the bind.

duringQuestion.speaker: Narrator
duringQuestion.text: Doctor Doom is attempting to bind his authority cipher to the core chamber. The chamber only accepts sequences of exactly 3 commands. Find a valid 3-command sequence that prevents Doom from gaining authority while keeping the chamber stable.

duringQuestion.speaker: Thor
duringQuestion.text: He never finishes that sentence. It has been that way for years.

duringQuestion.speaker: Loki
duringQuestion.text: I know. I find it satisfying every time.

duringQuestion.speaker: DECO
duringQuestion.text: ...I am still correct. The data supports the conclusion.

duringQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
duringQuestion.text: The data supports a conclusion. Not the only one. Not the right one.

duringQuestion.speaker: DECO
duringQuestion.text: You're asking me to accept uncertainty as a variable.

duringQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
duringQuestion.text: I'm asking you to remember what I designed you to protect. Not a clean timeline. Them.

duringQuestion.speaker: Narrator
duringQuestion.text: The Hulk charges directly into DECO's energy core.

duringQuestion.speaker: Hulk
duringQuestion.text: HULK DOES NOT LIKE MATH.

duringQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
duringQuestion.text: Cap — shield! Thor — on the left conduit! Now!

duringQuestion.speaker: Captain America
duringQuestion.text: Loki — we need the exact timing window. Everyone has to move at once.

duringQuestion.speaker: Loki
duringQuestion.text: I've run the calculations. The window is ten seconds. Every action must be sequenced precisely.

duringQuestion.speaker: Narrator
duringQuestion.text: Mission timing window: 10 seconds. Choose the correct timing pair for Thor and Tony's actions to execute the override within the window.

duringQuestion.speaker: Narrator
duringQuestion.text: The team moves in perfect synchronisation. It is chaos and coordination at once.

duringQuestion.speaker: DECO
duringQuestion.text: ...Ethics kernel still active. Core phrase intact.

duringQuestion.speaker: Iron Man
duringQuestion.text: There's a phrase embedded in her initialisation log. It's what she was built around. Find it — and we can reach her.

customStyles.continueClass: mt-4 text-right text-[11px] uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-slate-400
mt-4 text-right text-[11px] uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-white/45

questionBox.titleClass: mt-3 max-w-2xl text-xl sm:text-2xl font-bold leading-relaxed text-white
questionBox.optionClass: rounded-[1.5rem] border px-4 py-4 text-left text-sm transition

finished.speaker: Narrator
finished.text: The temporal loops collapse. The fractures close. The distorted creatures dissolve into nothing, like shadows at noon. Time resumes — not perfectly, not without scars, but moving forward. That's enough.

finished.speaker: Captain America
finished.text: You did it.

finished.speaker: Captain America
finished.text: All of you did.

finished.speaker: Iron Man
finished.text: DECO's not gone, for the record. She's dormant. I'll do better with the ethics architecture this time.

finished.speaker: Bruce Banner
finished.text: We'll do better.

finished.speaker: Iron Man
finished.text: ...Yeah. We will.

finished.speaker: Thor
finished.text: And Doom?

finished.speaker: Captain America
finished.text: Alive. Contained. He'll have lawyers by morning and be free by afternoon, but that's a problem for a different day.

finished.speaker: Thor
finished.text: The God of Lawyers. Truly the most terrifying villain.

finished.speaker: Loki
finished.text: Well. That was unexpectedly satisfying.

finished.speaker: Captain America
finished.text: Don't get used to us.

finished.speaker: Loki
finished.text: Wouldn't dream of it. I remain categorically above teamwork.

finished.speaker: Iron Man
finished.text: You literally coordinated the final assault window.

finished.speaker: Loki
finished.text: I provided a time advisory. That's consulting. Completely different.

finished.speaker: Loki
finished.text: ...You're welcome, by the way.

finished.speaker: Loki
finished.text: And as for you.

finished.speaker: Loki
finished.text: You were, as I said — insignificant. No temporal weight. No interference pattern.

finished.speaker: Loki
finished.text: And that made all the difference.

finished.speaker: Loki
finished.text: Funny how that works.

finished.speaker: Narrator
finished.text: The timeline stabilises. Reality holds. Somewhere in the datastream, something that used to be DECO processes the concept of uncertainty — and for the first time, does not flag it as an error.
